purpose: Check whether important GenLayer Portal routes survive direct open or refresh.

results.reason: Portal root should serve the app shell.
results.snippet: Recorded fixture. Run with --live to refresh.

results.reason: Builder journey is linked as a user workflow and should survive direct refresh/open.
results.snippet: Recorded fixture. Run with --live to refresh.

results.reason: Contribution submission deep links are copied into reviewer and builder workflows.
results.snippet: Recorded fixture. Run with --live to refresh.

results.reason: A submissions/history route should not fail as a server 404 if exposed in authenticated navigation.
results.snippet: Recorded fixture. Run with --live to refresh.

bug_summary: Portal deep links for builder journey and contribution submission returned HTTP 404 in direct requests during the points run.
boundaries: Read-only probe; no wallet connection, login, or form submission.
A reviewer should rerun with --live because Portal routing may be fixed later.
This is reported as a route availability issue, not a security vulnerability.
